_note: SFX plan for video-2 (blender portable ad, 8s). 3 cues, sparse per brand.md §10 — short-form ads need every SFX to earn its keep. Voice is ~-21 dB RMS; per-cue gain_db keeps SFX under voice. Sidechain duck applied by mix_sfx.py. Cues synced to edited-transcript.json word times AND the visual beat (shot animation frames).

events.note: Transition whoosh synced to the count-up finishing (SpeedText shot, 0.50-2.50 master). Sets the punch on the speed claim.
Hero payoff. Pops exactly on the strongest word in the script. Layered over the SensoryPop shot's check mark reveal.
Closing chime. Reward-sound = 'go buy it'. Lands as the ProductCTA pill is fully on screen and the CTA text is readable.
